metadata.description: Browser lifecycle management skills — pre-flight checks, post-session cleanup, and heavy cleanup for AI browser agents

plugins.name: browser-preflight
plugins.description: Pre-flight resource check before launching Browser Subagent. Use when the agent is about to start a browser session. Checks RAM, disk space, and kills zombie processes to prevent crashes.

plugins.name: browser-cleanup
plugins.description: Post-session cleanup after Browser Subagent returns. Deletes .webp recordings, kills zombie Chrome processes, cleans screenshots, and compresses context. Use immediately after every browser session.

plugins.name: browser-heavy-cleanup
plugins.description: Aggressive cleanup when disk space is critical. Kills ALL browser processes, deletes ALL recordings across ALL conversations, purges caches. Use when disk > 10GB or IDE is slow.
